list:texts.text:
Spring
It is growing warm. It often rains but there are many sunny days. Everything is green.

Summer
It is hot. The sun shines every day. People go to the beach and swim in the sea.

Autumn
It is mild but it is often windy. It is still warm but the days are short.

Winter
It is cold and it often snows. At sea the wind blows the first winter storms.
